    io.graphite - package io.graphite
    Graphite is a modern graph library for Java that provides graph data structures, graph algorithms, graph generation utilities, formatting, benchmarking, and graph input/output facilities.
    io.graphite.algorithm - package io.graphite.algorithm
    Graph algorithm implementations.
    io.graphite.algorithm.bipartite - package io.graphite.algorithm.bipartite
    Bipartite checking algorithms.
    io.graphite.algorithm.connectivity - package io.graphite.algorithm.connectivity
    Connectivity based algorithms.
    io.graphite.algorithm.cycle - package io.graphite.algorithm.cycle
    Cycle detection algorithms.
    io.graphite.algorithm.euler - package io.graphite.algorithm.euler
    Eulerian graph algorithms.
    io.graphite.algorithm.mst - package io.graphite.algorithm.mst
    Minimum Spanning Tree algorithms.
    io.graphite.algorithm.shortestpath - package io.graphite.algorithm.shortestpath
    Shortest path algorithms.
    io.graphite.algorithm.topology - package io.graphite.algorithm.topology
    Topology algorithms.
    io.graphite.algorithm.traversal - package io.graphite.algorithm.traversal
    Graph traversal algorithms.
    io.graphite.api - package io.graphite.api
    Public service APIs for graph algorithms.
    io.graphite.api.analysis - package io.graphite.api.analysis
     
    io.graphite.api.internal - package io.graphite.api.internal
     
    io.graphite.benchmark - package io.graphite.benchmark
    Performance benchmarking framework.
    io.graphite.benchmark.algorithm - package io.graphite.benchmark.algorithm
     
    io.graphite.benchmark.stress - package io.graphite.benchmark.stress
     
    io.graphite.builder - package io.graphite.builder
    Fluent builders for graph construction.
    io.graphite.examples - package io.graphite.examples
    Example applications demonstrating Graphite features.
    io.graphite.examples.algorithm - package io.graphite.examples.algorithm
